name_en: 🆕 M12659 Yellow! This pocket wallet is crafted from Monogram Heritage coated canvas, featuring classic elements such as the Damier grid pattern and the Marque L.Vuitton Déposée logo, showcasing Pharrell Williams' modern interpretation of the Monogram pattern.
